name: cleanup-unused-files
description: Aggressively reclaim disk space by removing caches, build artifacts, temp folders, and reproducible local tool state from repos and developer machines.

interface.shortDescription: Aggressively reclaim disk space by removing caches, build artifacts, temp folders, and reproducible local tool state from repos and developer machines.
interface.longDescription: Audit likely large cache and build directories, then delete reproducible junk with exact paths after making blast radius explicit.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Cleanup Unused Files safely.
